type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
For 2017 reporting, the Levelton CAPP VOC speciator from 2007 was used. For 2018, the updated WSP CAPP VOC speciator from 2018 was used.

US EPA AP-42 emission factor used to estimate emissions in 2018 from fuel gas combustion.

is recovered in the waste water system and is disposed by injection well.

comments.comment: Increase in leaks detected as a result of fugitive surveys in 2024

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in 2024 emissions was mainly driven by an increase in fugitive emissions identified through the LDAR surveys. During our tank inventory review, we identified that three fixed-roof tanks had been incorrectly classified as storage tanks with emission controls. This error has now been corrected in the current report
